title: craspedaria ciliata
intro: Craspedaria ciliata, also known as the ciliata or curled lip orchid, is a plant species in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Craspedaria ciliata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, tinctures, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
